paquita-pilates.title: Paquita Pilates Stuttgart
paquita-pilates.tagline: Website & Booking System for a Pilates Studio in Stuttgart

sections.heading: The Challenge
sections.body:
Paquita Pilates is a boutique studio in Stuttgart-East specialising in Reformer and Classical Pilates — offering private, duo and small-group sessions. Despite delivering a premium experience, the studio lacked a coherent brand identity, a professional website, and booking was handled manually. Friction for clients and trainers alike.

The core question: how do you translate the calm, body-aware spirit of a boutique Pilates studio into a complete brand and digital experience — one that attracts the right clients and makes studio management effortless?

sections.heading: Goals
sections.body:
Building identity and digital infrastructure from scratch:

• Brand development: logo, colour system, visual language — consistent across all touchpoints
• Website: a digital presence that communicates philosophy, class offering and team
• Booking system: an integrated platform with self-service for clients and admin tools for trainers
• Live at: paquitapilatesreformer.com

sections.heading: Scope & Services
sections.body:
Three interconnected pillars:

• Brand Identity & Design System: complete branding from scratch — logo, typography, colour palette. Flexible application across digital (website, Instagram) and physical (print materials) touchpoints.
• Website Design & Development: custom website as the primary digital presence — calm layouts, intentional whitespace, clear calls-to-action. Mobile-first responsive design: navigation collapses elegantly, content flows seamlessly from smartphone to desktop.
• Digital Booking System: dual architecture with a client interface (self-service booking, schedule) and an admin/trainer interface (class management, capacity).

[[IMAGE:paquita/paquita-mac.png]]

sections.heading: Design System
sections.body:
The visual system captures the dual nature of the studio: grounded and physical on one side, mindful and spiritual on the other.

Logo: a central eye — symbol of awareness and inner vision — with wings and ornamental detail, set in soft forms. The wordmark motto "RETURN TO LIFE" (Joseph Pilates' original method name) completes the timeless, contemporary emblem.

Typography:
• Metanoia (Display): a high-contrast editorial serif. The name means "transformative change of heart" — a direct mirror of the studio's philosophy. Elegance for headlines.
• Poppins (UI): geometric sans-serif for body text and interface elements — modern and legible

Colour Palette (7 colours):
• Olive Gold (#86703f): earthy depth, accent for structure
• Warm Taupe (#937955): neutral midtone
• Terracotta Copper (#b27d55): warmest tone, logo and key brand moments
• Cream White (#f0f1ed): primary background — soft, breathing
• Soft Teal (#97cbcc): the only cool tone — clarity and calm, highlight
• Muted Rose Taupe (#968173): resting tone for secondary text
• Warm Grey (#bbbbaf): versatile neutral for surfaces

The result: a colour world that communicates the sensory studio experience — natural materials, soft light, stillness.

sections.heading: Technology & Implementation
sections.body:
• Frontend: Vue.js + Ionic for cross-platform experience
• Backend: Node.js + MongoDB API, custom built
• Real-time schedule: instant availability and confirmation
• Credit system: flexible prepaid model for clients

sections.heading: Results & Outlook
sections.body:
Branding and website are live. The booking system is in active development and being rolled out incrementally.

Planned extensions:
• Automated Waitlist Management
• Credit / Package Systems
• Push notifications for class reminders

My contribution: complete branding, UX architecture, UI design and full-stack implementation. A booking platform that does not feel like off-the-shelf software — but like a conversation outside the studio.
